description: News provider code: RTRS=Reuters, ASSPR=AP, ASINIK, FT
Refinitiv ticker(s) associated with the headline
notes: Null for sector-level headlines; multiple tickers separated by space
Null for no-news placeholder rows (42 rows)

description: Daily opening price for SMH or SOXX
Daily high price for SMH or SOXX
Daily low price for SMH or SOXX
Daily closing price for SMH or SOXX
Daily trading volume for SMH or SOXX

notes: Always positive; approximates annualised daily volatility when scaled

description: h-day ahead average volatility target: (1/h) * sum(GK_{t+j}, j=1 to h)
5-day average GK volatility: mean(GK_{t-1} to GK_{t-5})
22-day average GK volatility: mean(GK_{t-1} to GK_{t-22})

notes: Always positive; measures intraday price dispersion; structurally related to GK_t
First 19 observations unavailable due to rolling window; values near 1.0 indicate normal volume
Computed per headline using FinBERT (Araci 2019); range approx -1 to +1

description: Daily average net sentiment: mean(s_i) across all headlines on day t
notes: Set to 0 on no-news days; intentionally simple average without source weighting
